text_block_list.text:
—That day. 
I believe I truly met an angel.

text_block_list.name: Blonde Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: It's okay… It's okay. There's nothing to be afraid of. Why don't you come over here for a little bit? Come on—
I was visiting the park on my early morning walk. The horsegirl was crouching in front of a bush, talking to something.

text_block_list.name: Blonde Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: …Still not in the mood, huh? Hehe. That's fine, just whenever you feel like it. I'll be right here.

She had a very gentle, soft aura about her. 
I wondered what she was talking to. Following her gaze—

text_block_list.name: Cat
choice_data_list: <size=38>A cat…? Does it live in this park…?</size>

text_block_list.name: Blonde Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: …? Ah… Yes, it is.
choice_data_list: <size=38>Ah… Sorry for talking to you so suddenly</size>

text_block_list.name: Blonde Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: No, no, please don't worry about it. I was just having a one-sided conversation with this cat myself.

text_block_list.name: Blonde Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Just as you said, the cat seems to have made this park its home… As far as I know, it's always here all alone.
I crouched down beside her to peek in, but the cat glared at me and backed away deeper into the bushes. It was completely unapproachable.

text_block_list.name: Blonde Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: This little one… I think it's afraid of people. Plus, it seems to be unwell, which makes it even more scared.

text_block_list.name: Blonde Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
Most likely. It keeps minding its stomach area… 
Look, there it goes again. …Its eyes and its voice both seem mixed with pain and discomfort.

text_block_list.name: Blonde Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: I was hoping to take it to the vet. But whenever I try to get close, it just retreats further inside. I want to do something to help it…
choice_data_list: <size=38>Should I go buy something for it? Like food?</size>

text_block_list.name: Blonde Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. Actually, I brought some with me too. 
But it won't eat unless it drops its guard…
choice_data_list: <size=38>I see… I hope it warms up to you.</size>

text_block_list.name: Blonde Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Thank you for your concern. 
I think I'll stay here with the cat until it comes out.
After parting ways with her and taking care of my own errands—
The clear early morning sky felt like a lie as raindrops began to fall from the heavy, low-hanging clouds.
—It was evening, on my way back. Amidst the pouring rain, the horsegirl and the cat I met this morning crossed my mind once again.

text_block_list.name: Blonde Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: 『I think I'll stay here with the cat until it comes out』
Only the quiet sound of rain could be heard on the hill, which had grown completely dark. I thought she must have gone home by now, but—

text_block_list.name: Blonde Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: It's gotten a bit chilly… It'd be terrible if you caught a cold. I have a towel, so you can wrap yourself in it like a blanket.

text_block_list.name: Blonde Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: And then, if you'd like… won't you let a vet examine you? There's nothing to be afraid of. I'll be right by your side the whole time.

—She was still there. 
In the rain. In the exact same spot as this morning.
choice_data_list: <size=38>Hey…! You don't even have an umbrella…!</size>
<size=38>Hey…! You don't even have an umbrella…!</size>

text_block_list.name: Blonde Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
Ah—You're from this morning… 
Thank you for worrying about me.
choice_data_list: <size=38>…Have you been here this whole time?</size>
<size=38>…Have you been here this whole time?</size>

text_block_list.name: Blonde Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I wanted to stay by its side and reassure it. 
I wanted to tell it… 『You are not all alone』

text_block_list.name: Blonde Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
So—just a little longer. 
It finally came this far.

text_block_list.name: Blonde Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Look, see? It's come a lot closer than it was this morning.

text_block_list.name: Blonde Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: …This cat definitely needs treatment. Therefore—I just need a little more time until I can convey to it, 『You don't need to feel anxious』
In the unceasing rain, I watched over the quiet interaction between her and the cat. And then—

text_block_list.name: Blonde Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
……
……Come here.

text_block_list.name: Cat
text_block_list.text: …Meo～w.
The cat finally approached her outstretched hand, timidly at first—then eventually began rubbing its forehead against it.

text_block_list.name: Blonde Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
…Hehe. You believed in me, didn't you? 
There's no need to worry. You'll get better for sure.
Afterwards, I helped her find a 24-hour emergency veterinary clinic and tagged along. It seemed she had already prepared everything needed to transport the cat.

text_block_list.name: Blonde Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Hehe, it seems quite comfortable in there. It'll be a little while longer before we reach the clinic, but we're safe for now.

text_block_list.name: Blonde Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Little kitty. After the vet, how about we look for a new home together? I'll ask around to see if anyone can foster you.
choice_data_list: I'll ask around for people who might be able to take it in too

text_block_list.name: Blonde Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much. Don't worry, little kitty, I'll introduce you to a wonderful foster parent.

text_block_list.name: Blonde Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Until then… I'll stay close so you won't feel lonely. I hope you'll connect with someone kind… and find happiness.

text_block_list.name: Blonde Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Once you're able to eat properly again, I'll give you some delicious canned food to celebrate.

text_block_list.name: Cat
text_block_list.text: Meo～w♪

text_block_list.name: Blonde Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I wonder if it understands what I'm saying.
Perhaps "pure and innocent" is the right phrase. I felt her actions were rooted in something fundamentally different from the ordinary urge to protect an animal just because it's cute.

text_block_list.name: Blonde Horsegirl
choice_data_list: <size=38>…Come to think of it, I never asked your name</size>

text_block_list.name: Blonde Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
Ah… Hehe♪ 
That's right.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
I am—Victoire Pisa. I attend Tracen Academy. 
It's a pleasure to meet you.
Illuminated by the light of the streetlamp, the girl smiled.
—An angel's smile might be something exactly like this.
The girl's smile was pure enough to make anyone who saw it think so.
